data.current_description: Search and autocomplete for companies based on name, registration number, or other criteria.
data.description_suggestion: Search and autocomplete for companies based on name, registration number, or other criteria. Returns a list of matching company proposals with validation data. Supports partial matching and real-time suggestions for user input correction.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks detail about what is returned and the nature of the search results. Enhanced description clarifies that it returns proposals/suggestions and explains the autocomplete/correction capability consistent with Foxentry's core purpose.
